title: A Brussels Community Moves on From Terrorist Attacks, but New Challenges Emerge
summary_full: Molenbeek was branded a hotbed of radicalization after the Paris and Brussels terrorist attacks of a decade ago. Now it is trying to reinvent itself.
summary_public: Molenbeek was branded a hotbed of radicalization after the Paris and Brussels terrorist attacks of a decade ago. Now it is trying to reinvent itself.
